_intent: Each topic is a news angle for the brief generator. The newsQuery feeds Google News RSS to fetch real recent articles. Tony comments on whichever real article we pick, from the warehouse-ops POV. Customs-broker how-to topics belong to canflow, not here.

topics.title: Port of Montreal operations and labor
topics.newsQuery: "Port of Montreal" OR "Montreal port" OR longshore Montreal

topics.title: CBSA policy and CARM rollout updates
topics.newsQuery: CBSA OR CARM OR "Canada Border Services Agency"

topics.newsQuery: CETA OR "Canada Europe trade" OR "Canada EU trade"

topics.newsQuery: "CN Rail" OR "CPKC" OR "Canadian Pacific" OR "Canadian National Railway" intermodal
